# kong-gateway_group_role (Resource)

GroupRole Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kong-gateway_group_role" "my_grouprole" {
  group_id  = ""
  role_id   = "...my_role_id..."
  workspace = "...my_workspace..."
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (String) ID of the Group to lookup. Requires replacement if changed.

### Optional

- `role_id` (String) ID of the RBAC role assigned to the group. Requires replacement if changed.
- `workspace` (String) Workspace ID. Requires replacement if changed.
